name: EdwDmProvDirDmProvLangExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS ( SELECT PROV_D.PROV_ID AS PROV_ID, LANG_D.CMN_PRCT_LANG_SEQ_NO AS LANG_SEQ_NO, LANG_D.SRC_SYS_CD AS SRC_SYS_CD, CASE WHEN LANG_D.CMN_PRCT_LANG_DESC IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(LANG_D.CMN_PRCT_LANG_DESC)) = '' THEN '' ELSE LANG_D.CMN_PRCT_LANG_DESC END AS LANG_DESC, CAST('@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' AS DATETIME) AS LAST_UPDT_DT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.PROV_D PROV_D JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.CMN_PRCT_LANG_D LANG_D ON PROV_D.CMN_PRCT_SK = LANG_D.CMN_PRCT_SK WHERE PROV_D.SRC_SYS_CD = 'FACETS' AND LANG_D.CMN_PRCT_LANG_DESC NOT IN ('NA','English','[None or N/A]') ) SELECT PROV_ID, LANG_SEQ_NO, SRC_SYS_CD, LANG_DESC, LAST_UPDT_DT FROM cte
